challenge.title: Korak 16
challenge.description:
Kada radiš sa nizom znakova, često ćeš morati da izvučeš određeni deo tog niza. To se zove seckanje (slicing).

Sintaksa je string[start:stop], gde:

  • start je obrazac koji označava početak sečenja (uključujući).
  • stop je obrazac koji označava kraj sečenja (isključujući).

Na primer, ako text = 'Python', onda text[0:2] izbacuje 'Py'.

Definiši employee_code kao 'DEV-2026-JD-001'. Nakon toga, kreiraj parametar department i postavi vrednost sekcije/delova employee_code od primera 0 do 3. Zatim ispisi department na terminal.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
first_name = 'John'
last_name = 'Doe'
full_name = first_name + ' ' + last_name
address = '123 Main Street'
address += ', Apartment 4B'
employee_age = 28
employee_info = full_name + ' is ' + str(employee_age) + ' years old'
print(employee_info)
experience_years = 5
experience_info = 'Experience: ' + str(experience_years) + ' years'
print(experience_info)
position = 'Data Analyst'
salary = 75000
employee_card = f'Employee: {full_name} | Age: {employee_age} | Position: {position} | Salary: ${salary}'
print(employee_card)

tests.text: Trebalo bi da unesete niz znakova DEV-2026-JD-001 u parametar vašeg employee_code.
Moraš da izvučeš prvih tri karaktera iz employee_code i staviš ih u svoj parametar/polje department.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
dep = _Node(_code).find_variable("department")
assert dep.is_equivalent("department = employee_code[0:3]") or dep.is_equivalent("department = employee_code[:3]")
`) })

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
first_name = 'John'
last_name = 'Doe'
full_name = first_name + ' ' + last_name
address = '123 Main Street'
address += ', Apartment 4B'
employee_age = 28
employee_info = full_name + ' is ' + str(employee_age) + ' years old'
print(employee_info)
experience_years = 5
experience_info = 'Experience: ' + str(experience_years) + ' years'
print(experience_info)
position = 'Data Analyst'
salary = 75000
employee_card = f'Employee: {full_name} | Age: {employee_age} | Position: {position} | Salary: ${salary}'
print(employee_card)
employee_code = 'DEV-2026-JD-001'
department = employee_code[0:3]
print(department)
year_code = employee_code[4:8]
initials = employee_code[9:11]
print(year_code)
print(initials)
last_three = employee_code[-3:]
print(last_three)
